                    ret                                     ;[0284] c9

_newline:
                    ld        hl,($b7d3)                    ;[0285] 2a d3 b7
                    inc       hl                            ;[0288] 23
                    ld        a,l                           ;[0289] 7d
                    sub       $3c                           ;[028a] d6 3c
                    ld        a,h                           ;[028c] 7c
                    rla                                     ;[028d] 17
                    ccf                                     ;[028e] 3f
                    rra                                     ;[028f] 1f
                    sbc       $80                           ;[0290] de 80
                    jp        nc,i_15_almazar_c             ;[0292] d2 a3 02
                    ld        hl,$0000                      ;[0295] 21 00 00
                    ld        (_cursor_position),hl         ;[0298] 22 d1 b7
                    ld        hl,($b7d3)                    ;[029b] 2a d3 b7
                    inc       hl                            ;[029e] 23
                    ld        ($b7d3),hl                    ;[029f] 22 d3 b7
                    ret                                     ;[02a2] c9

i_15_almazar_c:
                    call      _shift_text_up                ;[02a3] cd f1 01

                    ld        (_cursor_position),hl         ;[02a9] 22 d1 b7
i_16_almazar_c:
                    ret                                     ;[02ac] c9

_write_to_char_ram:
                    ld        hl,$0002                      ;[02ad] 21 02 00
                    call      l_gcharsp                     ;[02b0] cd 1e 01
                    ld        de,$000a                      ;[02b3] 11 0a 00
                    and       a                             ;[02b6] a7
                    sbc       hl,de                         ;[02b7] ed 52
                    jp        nz,i_17_almazar_c             ;[02b9] c2 c0 02
                    call      _newline                      ;[02bc] cd 85 02
                    ret                                     ;[02bf] c9

i_17_almazar_c:
                    ld        hl,(_char_ram)                ;[02c0] 2a cf b7
                    push      hl                            ;[02c3] e5
                    ld        hl,($b7d3)                    ;[02c4] 2a d3 b7
                    ld        de,$0050                      ;[02c7] 11 50 00
                    call      l_muls_16_16x16               ;[02ca] cd 21 70
                    ex        de,hl                         ;[02cd] eb
                    ld        hl,(_cursor_position)         ;[02ce] 2a d1 b7
                    add       hl,de                         ;[02d1] 19
                    pop       de                            ;[02d2] d1
                    add       hl,de                         ;[02d3] 19
                    push      hl                            ;[02d4] e5
                    ld        hl,$0004                      ;[02d5] 21 04 00
                    add       hl,sp                         ;[02d8] 39
                    pop       de                            ;[02d9] d1
                    ld        a,(hl)                        ;[02da] 7e
                    ld        (de),a                        ;[02db] 12
                    ld        hl,(_cursor_position)         ;[02dc] 2a d1 b7
                    inc       hl                            ;[02df] 23
                    ld        a,l                           ;[02e0] 7d
                    sub       $50                           ;[02e1] d6 50
                    ld        a,h                           ;[02e3] 7c
                    rla                                     ;[02e4] 17
                    ccf                                     ;[02e5] 3f
                    rra                                     ;[02e6] 1f
                    sbc       $80                           ;[02e7] de 80
                    jp        nc,i_18_almazar_c             ;[02e9] d2 f4 02
                    ld        hl,(_cursor_position)         ;[02ec] 2a d1 b7
                    inc       hl                            ;[02ef] 23
                    ld        (_cursor_position),hl         ;[02f0] 22 d1 b7
                    ret                                     ;[02f3] c9

                    call      l_gcharsp                     ;[02fb] cd 1e 01

                    call      l_gcharsp                     ;[0306] cd 1e 01
                    push      hl                            ;[0309] e5
                    call      _write_to_char_ram            ;[030a] cd ad 02
                    pop       bc                            ;[030d] c1
                    ld        hl,$0000                      ;[030e] 21 00 00
                    ret                                     ;[0311] c9

_get_char_from_software_keyboard:
                    dec       sp                            ;[0312] 3b
                    pop       hl                            ;[0313] e1
                    ld        l,$00                         ;[0314] 2e 00
                    push      hl                            ;[0316] e5
i_20:
                    ld        hl,$0000                      ;[0317] 21 00 00
                    add       hl,sp                         ;[031a] 39
                    ld        a,(hl)                        ;[031b] 7e
                    and       a                             ;[031c] a7
                    jp        nz,i_21_almazar_c             ;[031d] c2 32 03
                    ld        hl,$0000                      ;[0320] 21 00 00
                    add       hl,sp                         ;[0323] 39
                    ex        de,hl                         ;[0324] eb
                    ld        hl,(_software_keyboard_read_address_ptr);[0325] 2a cd b7
                    ld        a,(hl)                        ;[0328] 7e
                    ld        (de),a                        ;[0329] 12
                    ld        hl,(_software_keyboard_read_address_ptr);[032a] 2a cd b7
                    ld        (hl),$00                      ;[032d] 36 00
                    jp        i_20                          ;[032f] c3 17 03
i_21_almazar_c:

___fflush:
                    pop       bc                            ;[6868] c1
                    pop       hl                            ;[6869] e1
                    push      hl                            ;[686a] e5
                    push      bc                            ;[686b] c5
                    ld        e,(hl)                        ;[686c] 5e
                    inc       hl                            ;[686d] 23
                    ld        d,(hl)                        ;[686e] 56
                    inc       hl                            ;[686f] 23
                    ld        a,(hl)                        ;[6870] 7e
                    and       $14                           ;[6871] e6 14
                    cp        $04                           ;[6873] fe 04
                    jr        nz,check_extra                ;[6875] 20 06
                    push      de                            ;[6877] d5
                    call      _fsync                        ;[6878] cd cd 6e
                    pop       bc                            ;[687b] c1
                    ret                                     ;[687c] c9

check_extra:
                    ld        a,(hl)                        ;[687d] 7e
                    and       $20                           ;[687e] e6 20
                    cp        $20                           ;[6880] fe 20
                    jr        nz,fflush_error               ;[6882] 20 18
                    push      ix                            ;[6884] dd e5
                    dec       hl                            ;[6886] 2b
                    dec       hl                            ;[6887] 2b
                    push      hl                            ;[6888] e5
                    pop       ix                            ;[6889] dd e1
                    ld        l,(ix+$04)                    ;[688b] dd 6e 04
                    ld        h,(ix+$05)                    ;[688e] dd 66 05
                    ld        a,$06                         ;[6891] 3e 06
                    call      l_jphl                        ;[6893] cd 9e 01
                    pop       ix                            ;[6896] dd e1
                    ld        hl,$0000                      ;[6898] 21 00 00
                    ret                                     ;[689b] c9

fflush_error:
                    ld        hl,$ffff                      ;[689c] 21 ff ff
                    ret                                     ;[689f] c9

___fgets:

                    add       hl,sp                         ;[68ac] 39
                    call      l_gint                        ;[68ad] cd 42 01
                    ld        a,h                           ;[68b0] 7c
                    rlca                                    ;[68b1] 07
                    jr        c,$68b8                       ;[68b2] 38 04
                    or        l                             ;[68b4] b5
                    jr        nz,$68b8                      ;[68b5] 20 01
                    scf                                     ;[68b7] 37
                    jp        nc,i_2_stdio_fgets_c          ;[68b8] d2 c5 68
                    ld        hl,$000a                      ;[68bb] 21 0a 00
                    add       hl,sp                         ;[68be] 39
                    call      l_gint                        ;[68bf] cd 42 01
                    pop       bc                            ;[68c2] c1
                    pop       bc                            ;[68c3] c1
                    ret                                     ;[68c4] c9

___fchkstd:
                    pop       hl                            ;[6970] e1
                    pop       de                            ;[6971] d1
                    push      de                            ;[6972] d5
                    push      hl                            ;[6973] e5
                    ld        hl,$0000                      ;[6974] 21 00 00
                    inc       de                            ;[6977] 13
                    inc       de                            ;[6978] 13
                    ld        a,(de)                        ;[6979] 1a
                    and       $10                           ;[697a] e6 10
                    scf                                     ;[697c] 37
                    ret       z                             ;[697d] c8
                    dec       hl                            ;[697e] 2b
                    ld        a,(de)                        ;[697f] 1a
                    and       $02                           ;[6980] e6 02
                    ret       nz                            ;[6982] c0
                    inc       hl                            ;[6983] 23
                    inc       hl                            ;[6984] 23
                    and       a                             ;[6985] a7
                    ret                                     ;[6986] c9

___fgetc:
                    pop       bc                            ;[6987] c1
                    pop       hl                            ;[6988] e1
                    push      hl                            ;[6989] e5
                    push      bc                            ;[698a] c5
                    push      ix                            ;[698b] dd e5
                    push      hl                            ;[698d] e5
                    pop       ix                            ;[698e] dd e1
                    ld        a,(ix+$02)                    ;[6990] dd 7e 02
                    and       a                             ;[6993] a7
                    jp        z,is_eof                      ;[6994] ca 11 6a
                    bit       3,a                           ;[6997] cb 5f
                    jp        nz,is_eof                     ;[6999] c2 11 6a
                    bit       0,a                           ;[699c] cb 47
                    jr        z,no_ungetc                   ;[699e] 28 0c
                    res       0,(ix+$02)                    ;[69a0] dd cb 02 86
                    ld        l,(ix+$03)                    ;[69a4] dd 6e 03
                    ld        h,$00                         ;[69a7] 26 00
                    jp        fgetc_end                     ;[69a9] c3 1c 6a
no_ungetc:
                    bit       7,a                           ;[69ac] cb 7f
                    jr        z,no_string_stdio_fgetc_c     ;[69ae] 28 28
                    ld        l,(ix+$04)                    ;[69b0] dd 6e 04
                    ld        h,(ix+$05)                    ;[69b3] dd 66 05
                    ld        a,h                           ;[69b6] 7c
                    or        l                             ;[69b7] b5
                    jp        z,is_eof                      ;[69b8] ca 11 6a
                    dec       hl                            ;[69bb] 2b
                    ld        (ix+$04),l                    ;[69bc] dd 75 04
                    ld        (ix+$05),h                    ;[69bf] dd 74 05
                    ld        l,(ix+$00)                    ;[69c2] dd 6e 00
                    ld        h,(ix+$01)                    ;[69c5] dd 66 01
                    ld        a,(hl)                        ;[69c8] 7e
                    inc       hl                            ;[69c9] 23
                    ld        (ix+$00),l                    ;[69ca] dd 75 00
                    ld        (ix+$01),h                    ;[69cd] dd 74 01
                    and       a                             ;[69d0] a7
                    jr        z,is_eof                      ;[69d1] 28 3e
                    ld        l,a                           ;[69d3] 6f
                    ld        h,$00                         ;[69d4] 26 00
                    jr        fgetc_end                     ;[69d6] 18 44
no_string_stdio_fgetc_c:
                    bit       5,a                           ;[69d8] cb 6f
                    and       $20                           ;[69da] e6 20
                    jr        z,not_extra_fp                ;[69dc] 28 0f
                    ld        l,(ix+$04)                    ;[69de] dd 6e 04
                    ld        h,(ix+$05)                    ;[69e1] dd 66 05
                    ld        a,$01                         ;[69e4] 3e 01
                    call      l_jphl                        ;[69e6] cd 9e 01
                    jr        nc,fgetc_end                  ;[69e9] 30 31
                    jr        seteof                        ;[69eb] 18 27
not_extra_fp:
                    push      ix                            ;[69ed] dd e5
                    call      ___fchkstd                    ;[69ef] cd 70 69
                    pop       ix                            ;[69f2] dd e1
                    jr        c,no_stdin                    ;[69f4] 38 0a
                    call      ___fgetc_cons                 ;[69f6] cd 3a 03
                    push      hl                            ;[69f9] e5
                    call      ___fputc_cons_native          ;[69fa] cd f8 02
                    pop       hl                            ;[69fd] e1
                    jr        fgetc_end                     ;[69fe] 18 1c
no_stdin:
                    ld        l,(ix+$00)                    ;[6a00] dd 6e 00
                    ld        h,(ix+$01)                    ;[6a03] dd 66 01
                    push      ix                            ;[6a06] dd e5
                    call      _readbyte                     ;[6a08] cd cb 6e
                    pop       ix                            ;[6a0b] dd e1
                    ld        a,h                           ;[6a0d] 7c
                    inc       a                             ;[6a0e] 3c
                    jr        nz,fgetc_end                  ;[6a0f] 20 0b
is_eof:
                    ld        hl,$ffff                      ;[6a11] 21 ff ff
seteof:
                    ld        a,(ix+$02)                    ;[6a14] dd 7e 02
                    or        $08                           ;[6a17] f6 08
                    ld        (ix+$02),a                    ;[6a19] dd 77 02
fgetc_end:
                    pop       ix                            ;[6a1c] dd e1
                    ret                                     ;[6a1e] c9

                    ld        hl,$0000                      ;[6b64] 21 00 00
i_23:
                    pop       bc                            ;[6b67] c1
                    pop       bc                            ;[6b68] c1
                    ret                                     ;[6b69] c9

_docursor:
                    ld        hl,$0000                      ;[6b6a] 21 00 00
                    ld        a,h                           ;[6b6d] 7c
                    or        l                             ;[6b6e] b5
                    ret       nz                            ;[6b6f] c0
                    ld        hl,$005f                      ;[6b70] 21 5f 00
                    push      hl                            ;[6b73] e5
                    call      ___fputc_cons_native          ;[6b74] cd f8 02
                    pop       bc                            ;[6b77] c1
i_24:
                    ret                                     ;[6b78] c9

_fgets_cons_erase_character:
                    push      hl                            ;[6b79] e5
                    ld        hl,$0008                      ;[6b7a] 21 08 00
                    push      hl                            ;[6b7d] e5
                    call      ___fputc_cons_native          ;[6b7e] cd f8 02
                    pop       bc                            ;[6b81] c1
                    ld        hl,$0020                      ;[6b82] 21 20 00
                    push      hl                            ;[6b85] e5
                    call      ___fputc_cons_native          ;[6b86] cd f8 02
                    pop       bc                            ;[6b89] c1
                    ld        hl,$0008                      ;[6b8a] 21 08 00
                    push      hl                            ;[6b8d] e5
                    call      ___fputc_cons_native          ;[6b8e] cd f8 02
                    pop       bc                            ;[6b91] c1
                    pop       bc                            ;[6b92] c1
                    ret                                     ;[6b93] c9

_fputc_callee:
                    pop       de                            ;[6b94] d1
                    pop       hl                            ;[6b95] e1
                    pop       bc                            ;[6b96] c1
                    push      de                            ;[6b97] d5
                    push      ix                            ;[6b98] dd e5
                    push      hl                            ;[6b9a] e5
                    pop       ix                            ;[6b9b] dd e1
                    call      asm_fputc_callee              ;[6b9d] cd a3 6b
                    pop       ix                            ;[6ba0] dd e1
                    ret                                     ;[6ba2] c9

asm_fputc_callee:
                    ld        hl,$ffff                      ;[6ba3] 21 ff ff
                    ld        a,(ix+$02)                    ;[6ba6] dd 7e 02
                    and       a                             ;[6ba9] a7
                    ret       z                             ;[6baa] c8
                    ld        a,(ix+$02)                    ;[6bab] dd 7e 02
                    and       $80                           ;[6bae] e6 80
                    jr        z,no_string_stdio_fputc_callee_c;[6bb0] 28 26
                    ld        e,(ix+$04)                    ;[6bb2] dd 5e 04
                    ld        d,(ix+$05)                    ;[6bb5] dd 56 05
                    ld        a,d                           ;[6bb8] 7a
                    or        e                             ;[6bb9] b3
                    jr        nz,print_char_to_buf          ;[6bba] 20 03
                    ex        de,hl                         ;[6bbc] eb
                    dec       hl                            ;[6bbd] 2b
                    ret                                     ;[6bbe] c9

print_char_to_buf:
                    dec       de                            ;[6bbf] 1b
                    ld        (ix+$04),e                    ;[6bc0] dd 73 04
                    ld        (ix+$05),d                    ;[6bc3] dd 72 05
                    ld        l,(ix+$00)                    ;[6bc6] dd 6e 00
                    ld        h,(ix+$01)                    ;[6bc9] dd 66 01
                    ld        (hl),c                        ;[6bcc] 71
                    inc       hl                            ;[6bcd] 23
                    ld        (ix+$00),l                    ;[6bce] dd 75 00
                    ld        (ix+$01),h                    ;[6bd1] dd 74 01
                    ld        l,c                           ;[6bd4] 69
                    ld        h,$00                         ;[6bd5] 26 00
                    ret                                     ;[6bd7] c9

no_string_stdio_fputc_callee_c:
                    ld        a,(ix+$02)                    ;[6bd8] dd 7e 02
                    and       $20                           ;[6bdb] e6 20
                    jr        z,no_net                      ;[6bdd] 28 0e
                    ld        l,(ix+$04)                    ;[6bdf] dd 6e 04
                    ld        h,(ix+$05)                    ;[6be2] dd 66 05
                    ld        a,$02                         ;[6be5] 3e 02
                    push      bc                            ;[6be7] c5
                    call      l_jphl                        ;[6be8] cd 9e 01
                    pop       hl                            ;[6beb] e1
                    ret                                     ;[6bec] c9

no_net:
                    push      ix                            ;[6bed] dd e5
                    call      ___fchkstd                    ;[6bef] cd 70 69
                    pop       ix                            ;[6bf2] dd e1
                    jr        c,no_cons                     ;[6bf4] 38 06
                    push      bc                            ;[6bf6] c5
                    call      ___fputc_cons_native          ;[6bf7] cd f8 02
                    pop       hl                            ;[6bfa] e1
                    ret                                     ;[6bfb] c9

no_cons:
                    ld        l,(ix+$00)                    ;[6bfc] dd 6e 00
                    ld        h,(ix+$01)                    ;[6bff] dd 66 01
                    push      hl                            ;[6c02] e5
                    push      bc                            ;[6c03] c5
                    call      ___writebyte                  ;[6c04] cd cc 6e
                    pop       hl                            ;[6c07] e1
                    pop       bc                            ;[6c08] c1
                    ret                                     ;[6c09] c9

___puts:
                    pop       bc                            ;[6c0a] c1
                    pop       hl                            ;[6c0b] e1
                    push      hl                            ;[6c0c] e5
                    push      bc                            ;[6c0d] c5
                    push      hl                            ;[6c0e] e5
                    ld        hl,$b7f8                      ;[6c0f] 21 f8 b7
                    push      hl                            ;[6c12] e5
                    call      ___fputs_callee               ;[6c13] cd 22 6c
                    ld        hl,$b7a0                      ;[6c16] 21 a0 b7
                    push      hl                            ;[6c19] e5
                    ld        hl,$b7f8                      ;[6c1a] 21 f8 b7
                    push      hl                            ;[6c1d] e5
                    call      ___fputs_callee               ;[6c1e] cd 22 6c
                    ret                                     ;[6c21] c9

___fputs_callee:
                    pop       hl                            ;[6c22] e1
                    pop       bc                            ;[6c23] c1
                    pop       de                            ;[6c24] d1
                    push      hl                            ;[6c25] e5
                    push      ix                            ;[6c26] dd e5
                    push      bc                            ;[6c28] c5
                    pop       ix                            ;[6c29] dd e1
                    call      asm_fputs_callee              ;[6c2b] cd 31 6c
                    pop       ix                            ;[6c2e] dd e1
                    ret                                     ;[6c30] c9

asm_fputs_callee:
                    ld        hl,$0001                      ;[6c31] 21 01 00
                    ld        a,(de)                        ;[6c34] 1a
                    and       a                             ;[6c35] a7
                    ret       z                             ;[6c36] c8
                    inc       de                            ;[6c37] 13
                    push      de                            ;[6c38] d5
                    ld        c,a                           ;[6c39] 4f
                    ld        b,$00                         ;[6c3a] 06 00
                    push      ix                            ;[6c3c] dd e5
                    call      asm_fputc_callee              ;[6c3e] cd a3 6b
                    pop       ix                            ;[6c41] dd e1
                    pop       de                            ;[6c43] d1
                    ld        a,l                           ;[6c44] 7d
                    and       h                             ;[6c45] a4
                    inc       a                             ;[6c46] 3c
                    ret       z                             ;[6c47] c8
                    jr        asm_fputs_callee              ;[6c48] 18 e7
                    pop       bc                            ;[6c4a] c1
                    pop       af                            ;[6c4b] f1
                    pop       af                            ;[6c4c] f1
                    push      bc                            ;[6c4d] c5
                    ret                                     ;[6c4e] c9

___l_assert:
                    ld        hl,$b802                      ;[6c4f] 21 02 b8
                    push      hl                            ;[6c52] e5
                    ld        hl,$b7a2                      ;[6c53] 21 a2 b7
                    push      hl                            ;[6c56] e5
                    ld        hl,$0008                      ;[6c57] 21 08 00
                    call      l_gintspsp                    ;[6c5a] cd f5 00
                    ld        hl,$000c                      ;[6c5d] 21 0c 00
                    call      l_gintspsp                    ;[6c60] cd f5 00
                    ld        hl,$000a                      ;[6c63] 21 0a 00
                    add       hl,sp                         ;[6c66] 39
                    call      l_gint                        ;[6c67] cd 42 01
                    push      hl                            ;[6c6a] e5
                    ld        a,$05                         ;[6c6b] 3e 05
                    call      fprintf                       ;[6c6d] cd d1 6e
                    pop       bc                            ;[6c70] c1
                    pop       bc                            ;[6c71] c1
                    pop       bc                            ;[6c72] c1
                    pop       bc                            ;[6c73] c1
                    pop       bc                            ;[6c74] c1
                    ld        hl,$000f                      ;[6c75] 21 0f 00
                    call      _exit_fastcall                ;[6c78] cd fc 6e
                    ret                                     ;[6c7b] c9

__printf_handle_d:
                    ld        c,$01                         ;[6c7c] 0e 01
                    jp        __printf_number               ;[6c7e] c3 a9 6c
__printf_handle_s:
                    push      hl                            ;[6c81] e5
                    call      get_16bit_ap_parameter        ;[6c82] cd 78 6e
                    push      de                            ;[6c85] d5
                    ld        a,h                           ;[6c86] 7c
                    or        l                             ;[6c87] b5
                    jr        nz,printstr                   ;[6c88] 20 03
                    ld        hl,$b7c0                      ;[6c8a] 21 c0 b7
printstr:
                    push      hl                            ;[6c8d] e5
                    call      asm_strlen                    ;[6c8e] cd dc 70
                    ex        de,hl                         ;[6c91] eb
                    ld        l,(ix-$08)                    ;[6c92] dd 6e f8
                    ld        h,(ix-$07)                    ;[6c95] dd 66 f9
                    push      hl                            ;[6c98] e5
                    call      l_uge                         ;[6c99] cd d7 01
                    pop       hl                            ;[6c9c] e1
                    jr        nc,use_strlen                 ;[6c9d] 30 01
                    ex        de,hl                         ;[6c9f] eb
use_strlen:
                    pop       bc                            ;[6ca0] c1
                    call      __printf_print_aligned        ;[6ca1] cd 33 6d
printstr_end:
                    pop       de                            ;[6ca4] d1
                    pop       hl                            ;[6ca5] e1
                    jp        __printf_loop                 ;[6ca6] c3 12 6e
__printf_number:
                    push      hl                            ;[6ca9] e5
                    bit       6,(ix-$04)                    ;[6caa] dd cb fc 76
                    jr        z,printf_number16             ;[6cae] 28 08
                    call      get_32bit_ap_parameter        ;[6cb0] cd 89 6e
printlong:
                    push      hl                            ;[6cb3] e5
                    ld        l,a                           ;[6cb4] 6f
                    ld        h,b                           ;[6cb5] 60
                    jr        miniprintn                    ;[6cb6] 18 0c
printf_number16:
                    call      get_16bit_ap_parameter        ;[6cb8] cd 78 6e
                    push      de                            ;[6cbb] d5
                    ld        de,$0000                      ;[6cbc] 11 00 00
                    ld        a,c                           ;[6cbf] 79
                    and       a                             ;[6cc0] a7
                    call      nz,l_int2long_s               ;[6cc1] c4 d3 00
miniprintn:
                    ld        a,d                           ;[6cc4] 7a
                    rlca                                    ;[6cc5] 07
                    and       $01                           ;[6cc6] e6 01
                    and       c                             ;[6cc8] a1
                    jr        z,noneg                       ;[6cc9] 28 0a
                    call      l_long_neg                    ;[6ccb] cd 64 00
                    ld        a,$2d                         ;[6cce] 3e 2d
printsign:
                    call      __printf_print_to_buf         ;[6cd0] cd d5 6d
                    jr        miniprintn_start_process      ;[6cd3] 18 30
noneg:
                    ld        a,$20                         ;[6cd5] 3e 20
                    bit       3,(ix-$04)                    ;[6cd7] dd cb fc 5e
                    jr        nz,printsign                  ;[6cdb] 20 f3
                    ld        a,$2b                         ;[6cdd] 3e 2b
                    bit       1,(ix-$04)                    ;[6cdf] dd cb fc 4e
                    jr        nz,printsign                  ;[6ce3] 20 eb
                    bit       4,(ix-$04)                    ;[6ce5] dd cb fc 66
                    jr        z,miniprintn_start_process    ;[6ce9] 28 1a
                    ld        a,(ix-$09)                    ;[6ceb] dd 7e f7
                    cp        $0a                           ;[6cee] fe 0a
                    jr        z,miniprintn_start_process    ;[6cf0] 28 13
                    push      af                            ;[6cf2] f5
                    ld        a,$30                         ;[6cf3] 3e 30
                    call      __printf_print_to_buf         ;[6cf5] cd d5 6d
                    pop       af                            ;[6cf8] f1
                    cp        $10                           ;[6cf9] fe 10
                    jr        nz,miniprintn_start_process   ;[6cfb] 20 08
                    ld        a,$78                         ;[6cfd] 3e 78
                    add       (ix-$03)                      ;[6cff] dd 86 fd
                    call      __printf_print_to_buf         ;[6d02] cd d5 6d
miniprintn_start_process:
                    xor       a                             ;[6d05] af
                    push      af                            ;[6d06] f5
divloop:
                    push      de                            ;[6d07] d5
                    push      hl                            ;[6d08] e5
                    ld        l,(ix-$09)                    ;[6d09] dd 6e f7
                    ld        h,$00                         ;[6d0c] 26 00
                    ld        d,h                           ;[6d0e] 54
                    ld        e,h                           ;[6d0f] 5c
                    call      l_long_div_u                  ;[6d10] cd c5 00
                    exx                                     ;[6d13] d9
                    ld        a,l                           ;[6d14] 7d
                    cp        $ff                           ;[6d15] fe ff
                    push      af                            ;[6d17] f5
                    exx                                     ;[6d18] d9
                    ld        a,h                           ;[6d19] 7c
                    or        d                             ;[6d1a] b2
                    or        e                             ;[6d1b] b3
                    or        l                             ;[6d1c] b5
                    jr        nz,divloop                    ;[6d1d] 20 e8
printloop:
                    pop       af                            ;[6d1f] f1
                    jp        z,__printf_print_the_buffer   ;[6d20] ca bb 6d
                    add       $30                           ;[6d23] c6 30
                    cp        $3a                           ;[6d25] fe 3a
                    jr        c,printloop1                  ;[6d27] 38 05
                    add       $27                           ;[6d29] c6 27
                    add       (ix-$03)                      ;[6d2b] dd 86 fd
printloop1:
                    call      __printf_print_to_buf         ;[6d2e] cd d5 6d
                    jr        printloop                     ;[6d31] 18 ec
__printf_print_aligned:
                    ld        l,(ix-$06)                    ;[6d33] dd 6e fa
                    ld        h,(ix-$05)                    ;[6d36] dd 66 fb
                    ld        a,h                           ;[6d39] 7c
                    or        l                             ;[6d3a] b5
                    jr        z,width_done                  ;[6d3b] 28 11
                    push      hl                            ;[6d3d] e5
                    push      bc                            ;[6d3e] c5
                    call      l_ge                          ;[6d3f] cd 27 01
                    pop       bc                            ;[6d42] c1
                    pop       hl                            ;[6d43] e1
                    jr        nc,adjust_width               ;[6d44] 30 05
                    ld        hl,$0000                      ;[6d46] 21 00 00
                    jr        width_done                    ;[6d49] 18 03
adjust_width:
                    and       a                             ;[6d4b] a7
                    sbc       hl,de                         ;[6d4c] ed 52
width_done:
                    bit       0,(ix-$04)                    ;[6d4e] dd cb fc 46
                    push      bc                            ;[6d52] c5
                    call      z,print_padding               ;[6d53] cc 78 6d
                    pop       bc                            ;[6d56] c1
print_buffer:
                    ld        a,d                           ;[6d57] 7a
                    or        e                             ;[6d58] b3
                    jr        z,buffer_done                 ;[6d59] 28 0f
                    ld        a,(bc)                        ;[6d5b] 0a
                    bit       7,(ix-$04)                    ;[6d5c] dd cb fc 7e
                    call      nz,__printf_pickup_far        ;[6d60] c4 d6 01
                    call      __printf_doprint              ;[6d63] cd 84 6d
                    inc       bc                            ;[6d66] 03
                    dec       de                            ;[6d67] 1b
                    jr        print_buffer                  ;[6d68] 18 ed
buffer_done:
                    ld        c,$20                         ;[6d6a] 0e 20
print_padding_loop:
                    ld        a,h                           ;[6d6c] 7c
                    or        l                             ;[6d6d] b5
                    ret       z                             ;[6d6e] c8
                    push      bc                            ;[6d6f] c5
                    ld        a,c                           ;[6d70] 79
                    call      __printf_doprint              ;[6d71] cd 84 6d
                    pop       bc                            ;[6d74] c1
                    dec       hl                            ;[6d75] 2b
                    jr        print_padding                 ;[6d76] 18 00
print_padding:
                    ld        c,$20                         ;[6d78] 0e 20
                    bit       2,(ix-$04)                    ;[6d7a] dd cb fc 56
                    jr        z,print_padding_loop          ;[6d7e] 28 ec
                    ld        c,$30                         ;[6d80] 0e 30
                    jr        print_padding_loop            ;[6d82] 18 e8
__printf_doprint:
                    push      hl                            ;[6d84] e5
                    push      de                            ;[6d85] d5
                    push      bc                            ;[6d86] c5
                    push      ix                            ;[6d87] dd e5
                    exx                                     ;[6d89] d9
                    push      bc                            ;[6d8a] c5
                    push      de                            ;[6d8b] d5
                    exx                                     ;[6d8c] d9
                    ex        af,af'                        ;[6d8d] 08
                    push      af                            ;[6d8e] f5
                    ex        af,af'                        ;[6d8f] 08
                    inc       (ix-$02)                      ;[6d90] dd 34 fe
                    jr        nz,no_inc                     ;[6d93] 20 03
                    inc       (ix-$01)                      ;[6d95] dd 34 ff
no_inc:
                    ld        c,a                           ;[6d98] 4f
                    ld        b,$00                         ;[6d99] 06 00
                    push      bc                            ;[6d9b] c5
                    ld        c,(ix+$0a)                    ;[6d9c] dd 4e 0a
                    ld        b,(ix+$0b)                    ;[6d9f] dd 46 0b
                    push      bc                            ;[6da2] c5
                    ld        bc,$6dae                      ;[6da3] 01 ae 6d
                    push      bc                            ;[6da6] c5
                    ld        l,(ix+$08)                    ;[6da7] dd 6e 08
                    ld        h,(ix+$09)                    ;[6daa] dd 66 09
                    jp        (hl)                          ;[6dad] e9
doprint_return:
                    ex        af,af'                        ;[6dae] 08
                    pop       af                            ;[6daf] f1
                    ex        af,af'                        ;[6db0] 08
                    exx                                     ;[6db1] d9
                    pop       de                            ;[6db2] d1
                    pop       bc                            ;[6db3] c1
                    exx                                     ;[6db4] d9
                    pop       ix                            ;[6db5] dd e1
                    pop       bc                            ;[6db7] c1
                    pop       de                            ;[6db8] d1
                    pop       hl                            ;[6db9] e1
                    ret                                     ;[6dba] c9

__printf_print_the_buffer:
                    ld        d,$00                         ;[6dbb] 16 00
                    ld        e,(ix-$0a)                    ;[6dbd] dd 5e f6
                    call      __printf_get_buffer_address   ;[6dc0] cd cd 6d
                    ld        c,l                           ;[6dc3] 4d
                    ld        b,h                           ;[6dc4] 44
                    call      __printf_print_aligned        ;[6dc5] cd 33 6d
                    pop       de                            ;[6dc8] d1
                    pop       hl                            ;[6dc9] e1
                    jp        __printf_loop                 ;[6dca] c3 12 6e
__printf_get_buffer_address:
                    push      ix                            ;[6dcd] dd e5
                    pop       hl                            ;[6dcf] e1
                    ld        bc,$ffb0                      ;[6dd0] 01 b0 ff
                    add       hl,bc                         ;[6dd3] 09
                    ret                                     ;[6dd4] c9

__printf_print_to_buf:
                    push      hl                            ;[6dd5] e5
                    push      bc                            ;[6dd6] c5
                    call      __printf_get_buffer_address   ;[6dd7] cd cd 6d
                    ld        c,(ix-$0a)                    ;[6dda] dd 4e f6
                    ld        b,$00                         ;[6ddd] 06 00
                    add       hl,bc                         ;[6ddf] 09
                    inc       (ix-$0a)                      ;[6de0] dd 34 f6
                    ld        (hl),a                        ;[6de3] 77
                    pop       bc                            ;[6de4] c1
                    pop       hl                            ;[6de5] e1
                    ret                                     ;[6de6] c9

asm_printf:
                    ld        ix,$0000                      ;[6de7] dd 21 00 00
                    add       ix,sp                         ;[6deb] dd 39
                    ld        hl,$ffb0                      ;[6ded] 21 b0 ff
                    add       hl,sp                         ;[6df0] 39
                    ld        sp,hl                         ;[6df1] f9
                    ld        e,(ix+$02)                    ;[6df2] dd 5e 02
                    ld        d,(ix+$03)                    ;[6df5] dd 56 03
                    ld        l,(ix+$04)                    ;[6df8] dd 6e 04
                    ld        h,(ix+$05)                    ;[6dfb] dd 66 05
                    xor       a                             ;[6dfe] af
                    ld        (ix-$01),a                    ;[6dff] dd 77 ff
                    ld        (ix-$02),a                    ;[6e02] dd 77 fe
                    dec       a                             ;[6e05] 3d
                    ld        (ix-$05),a                    ;[6e06] dd 77 fb
                    ld        (ix-$06),a                    ;[6e09] dd 77 fa
                    ld        (ix-$07),a                    ;[6e0c] dd 77 f9
                    ld        (ix-$08),a                    ;[6e0f] dd 77 f8
__printf_loop:
                    ld        (ix-$09),$0a                  ;[6e12] dd 36 f7 0a
                    xor       a                             ;[6e16] af
                    ld        (ix-$03),a                    ;[6e17] dd 77 fd
                    ld        (ix-$04),a                    ;[6e1a] dd 77 fc
                    ld        (ix-$0a),a                    ;[6e1d] dd 77 f6
                    ld        a,(hl)                        ;[6e20] 7e
                    inc       hl                            ;[6e21] 23
                    and       a                             ;[6e22] a7
                    jr        nz,cont                       ;[6e23] 20 07
                    ld        hl,$004e                      ;[6e25] 21 4e 00
                    add       hl,sp                         ;[6e28] 39
                    ld        sp,hl                         ;[6e29] f9
                    pop       hl                            ;[6e2a] e1
__printf_get_flags:
                    ret                                     ;[6e2b] c9

cont:
                    cp        $25                           ;[6e2c] fe 25
                    jr        z,handle_percent              ;[6e2e] 28 05
print_format_character:
                    call      __printf_doprint              ;[6e30] cd 84 6d
                    jr        __printf_loop                 ;[6e33] 18 dd
handle_percent:
                    ld        a,(hl)                        ;[6e35] 7e
                    inc       hl                            ;[6e36] 23
                    cp        $25                           ;[6e37] fe 25
                    jr        z,print_format_character      ;[6e39] 28 f5
                    call      __printf_get_flags            ;[6e3b] cd 2b 6e
                    res       6,(ix-$04)                    ;[6e3e] dd cb fc b6
                    cp        $7a                           ;[6e42] fe 7a
                    jr        z,get_next_char               ;[6e44] 28 14
                    cp        $68                           ;[6e46] fe 68
                    jr        nz,check_long_qualifier       ;[6e48] 20 08
                    ld        a,(hl)                        ;[6e4a] 7e
                    inc       hl                            ;[6e4b] 23
                    cp        $68                           ;[6e4c] fe 68
                    jr        nz,no_long_qualifier          ;[6e4e] 20 0c
                    jr        get_next_char                 ;[6e50] 18 08
check_long_qualifier:
                    cp        $6c                           ;[6e52] fe 6c
                    jr        nz,no_long_qualifier          ;[6e54] 20 06
                    set       6,(ix-$04)                    ;[6e56] dd cb fc f6
get_next_char:
                    ld        a,(hl)                        ;[6e5a] 7e
                    inc       hl                            ;[6e5b] 23
no_long_qualifier:
                    push      hl                            ;[6e5c] e5

_rand:
                    ld        hl,(__stdlib_seed)            ;[7092] 2a c7 b7
                    ld        de,($b7c9)                    ;[7095] ed 5b c9 b7
                    call      asm_random_uniform_xor_32     ;[7099] cd ac 70
                    ld        (__stdlib_seed),hl            ;[709c] 22 c7 b7
                    ld        ($b7c9),de                    ;[709f] ed 53 c9 b7
                    ld        a,d                           ;[70a3] 7a
                    xor       l                             ;[70a4] ad
                    ld        l,a                           ;[70a5] 6f
                    ld        a,e                           ;[70a6] 7b
                    xor       h                             ;[70a7] ac
                    and       $7f                           ;[70a8] e6 7f
                    ld        h,a                           ;[70aa] 67
                    ret                                     ;[70ab] c9

                    ld        a,e                           ;[70bd] 7b
                    rra                                     ;[70be] 1f
                    xor       h                             ;[70bf] ac
                    ld        h,a                           ;[70c0] 67
                    ld        a,d                           ;[70c1] 7a
                    srl       a                             ;[70c2] cb 3f
                    xor       e                             ;[70c4] ab
                    ld        e,a                           ;[70c5] 5f
                    ld        a,h                           ;[70c6] 7c
                    rra                                     ;[70c7] 1f
                    ld        a,l                           ;[70c8] 7d
                    rra                                     ;[70c9] 1f
                    xor       d                             ;[70ca] aa
                    ld        d,a                           ;[70cb] 57
                    ld        a,l                           ;[70cc] 7d
                    rra                                     ;[70cd] 1f
                    ld        a,$00                         ;[70ce] 3e 00
                    rra                                     ;[70d0] 1f
                    xor       e                             ;[70d1] ab
                    ld        e,a                           ;[70d2] 5f
                    ret                                     ;[70d3] c9

___strncmp_callee:
                    pop       hl                            ;[70d4] e1
                    pop       bc                            ;[70d5] c1
                    pop       de                            ;[70d6] d1
                    ex        (sp),hl                       ;[70d7] e3
                    ex        de,hl                         ;[70d8] eb
                    jp        asm_strncmp                   ;[70d9] c3 e7 70
asm_strlen:
                    xor       a                             ;[70dc] af
                    ld        c,a                           ;[70dd] 4f
                    ld        b,a                           ;[70de] 47
                    cpir                                    ;[70df] ed b1
                    ld        hl,$ffff                      ;[70e1] 21 ff ff
                    sbc       hl,bc                         ;[70e4] ed 42
                    ret                                     ;[70e6] c9

asm_strncmp:
                    ld        a,b                           ;[70e7] 78
                    or        c                             ;[70e8] b1
                    jr        z,equal                       ;[70e9] 28 0d
loop_asm_strncmp:
                    ld        a,(de)                        ;[70eb] 1a
                    cpi                                     ;[70ec] ed a1
                    jr        nz,different                  ;[70ee] 20 0c
                    jp        po,equal                      ;[70f0] e2 f8 70
                    inc       de                            ;[70f3] 13
                    or        a                             ;[70f4] b7
                    jr        nz,loop_asm_strncmp           ;[70f5] 20 f4
                    dec       de                            ;[70f7] 1b
equal:
                    ld        hl,$0000                      ;[70f8] 21 00 00
                    ret                                     ;[70fb] c9

different:
                    dec       hl                            ;[70fc] 2b
                    sub       (hl)                          ;[70fd] 96
                    ld        h,a                           ;[70fe] 67
                    ret                                     ;[70ff] c9
